prose.en: Establish and follow a process, preferably automated, for revoking access to enterprise assets, through disabling accounts immediately upon termination, rights revocation, or role change of a user. Disabling accounts, instead of deleting accounts, may be necessary to preserve audit trails.

A process, preferably automated, is established and followed for revoking access to enterprise assets, through disabling accounts immediately upon termination, rights revocation, or role change of a user.
Accounts are disabled, instead of deleted, if needed, to preserve audit trails.
